title: vulpia pectinella
intro: Vulpia pectinella, also known as Crested Hair-grass, is a perennial grass species that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Vulpia pectinella include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and protecting against infections. The herbal preparations of Vulpia pectinella can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
